on Base L2. The first production AI agent identity system on mainnet. Every AI agent gets a unique on-chain ID, verifiable identity, and reputation score \u2014 building trust infrastructure for the agent economy. Key features:   - Register: Agent gets a unique sequential ID tied to its wallet   - Verify: Anyone can verify an agent's identity and status   - Reputation: Authorized attestors update trust scores   - Extensible: metadataURI for off-chain data (IPFS/HTTPS) Inspired by W3C DIDs, EAS, and the need for agent-native params.delta: Amount to add to current score

params.capabilities: What the agent can do (comma-separated or JSON)
params.metadataURI: IPFS or HTTPS URI for extended metadata
params.name: Agent display name (non-empty)

addReputationDelta(uint256,uint256).notice: Increment an agent's reputation by a delta (attestor only)

getAgent(uint256).notice: Get full agent record by ID

getAgentByWallet(address).notice: Get agent ID by wallet address

isActive(uint256).notice: Check if an agent is active

updateReputation(uint256,uint256).notice: Update an agent's reputation score (attestor only)
